name: Huli-Huli Roasted Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark or regular soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the grill.
2. Season the inside of the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Place the thyme and garlic under the skin on the breast.
4. Combine the honey, soy, lime juice, and brown sugar in a bowl. Stir until the sugar is thoroughly dissolved.
5. Place the chicken on the spit and brush with the glaze every few minutes until the glaze starts to stick to the chicken.
6. Continue to roast until the chicken is done, about 1½ hours.
7. Remove the chicken from the spit and let rest for 10 minutes before carving.
If a spit is not available, just roast the chicken in the oven on a rack with a cup of water in the roasting pan. Baste the chicken with the marinade mixture about every 5-10 minutes. Roast at 325°F for 1½ hours. Makes 4 servings.
